parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'ephemeral', text: ':hourglass_flowing_sand: Routing to *' + $json.agentName + '*... I\'ll post results when done.' }) }}

meta.description: Receives Slack slash commands (/ai), routes to the appropriate Ollama personality, and posts the response back to Slack via the response_url. Immediately ACKs Slack (within 3s) then posts the actual agent reply asynchronously. Agent routing: prefix task with 'kevin:', 'jason:', etc. Default agent: jason.
